title: Aulomyrcia vestita
taxonomy: Aulomyrcia vestita belongs to the family Myrtaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the myrtle family. The genus Aulomyrcia is a part of this family and is native to the Americas. It is a species of flowering plant in the order Myrtales. Aulomyrcia vestita is a type of shrub or small tree that is widely distributed in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Aulomyrcia vestita places it within the larger clade of Myrtaceae, which is a family of plants known for their fragrant flowers and edible fruits.
